entr/fade.notes: Exact structural match to starter-deck slide7 preset 9 entrance fade. Requires multi-slide harness on macOS PPT so the build engine pre-hides before the click-group fires.

exit/fade.notes: Mirrors entr/fade with transition=out and visibility=hidden. UNVERIFIED: oracle corpus has no preset 9 exit fade — all observed exit fades use preset 31/37/47/53 with extra anim children. Preset ID may be wrong; visually verify before promoting.

entr/appear.notes: Authored from oracle; diverges from current set.py handler which emits a nested fade effect. Migration to this template will require updating set.py.

emph/color.notes: TARGET_ATTRIBUTE = fill.color|line.color|shadow.color etc. INNER_FILL is the SVG fill_mode mapped to PPT 'hold' or 'remove'. UNVERIFIED: oracle corpus has an animClr example with presetID=27 nodeType=clickEffect grpId=0 (different preset, cleaner inner cTn, schemeClr instead of srgbClr) — our preset 7 withEffect shape may not match what PowerPoint authors for 'Change Fill Color'. Revisit when an oracle sample for preset 7 emph is captured.

emph/rotate.notes: ROTATION_BY is in 60000ths of a degree (PPT angle factor). INNER_FILL is the SVG fill_mode mapped to 'hold' or 'remove'.

emph/scale.notes: Scale values in 100000ths (PPT scale factor). INNER_FILL is the SVG fill_mode mapped to 'hold' or 'remove'. Companion animMotion for origin compensation is NOT emitted by this template alone — see emph/scale_with_origin for the composed version when authored.

path/motion.notes: PATH_DATA is a PPT motion-path string (coordinates normalized to 0-1, ends with E). NODE_TYPE is 'clickEffect' for standalone motion (motion.py) or 'withEffect' for composed motion (numeric.py width→scale+motion). INNER_FILL is the SVG fill_mode mapped to 'hold' or 'remove'. Does NOT express rotation (rAng) — motion animations with auto-rotate or fixed-rAng fall through to the imperative path.
